signals.headline: Cooper Flagg ROY Voting Tracker Update: Dead Heat with Kon Knueppel | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg ROY Voting Tracker Update: Dead Heat with Kon Knueppel | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Early confirmed Rookie of the Year ballots show **Cooper Flagg** with 13 first-place votes, 5 second-place, and **Kon Knueppel** with 12 first-place, 9 second-place, signaling a tight race rather than Flagg dominance despite his late-season surge to -250 odds[1].
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?

signals.headline: Bitcoin Hits $75K Milestone on Institutional Surge and Regulatory Clarity | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Hits $75K Milestone on Institutional Surge and Regulatory Clarity | NO | HIGH confidence**

Bitcoin surged past $75,000 in mid-April 2026, marking a technical breakout driven by record ETF inflows, MicroStrategy's treasury accumulation exceeding 300,000 BTC, and early 2026 regulatory classification of Bitcoin as a "Digital Commodity," enabling institutional adoption[1]. signals.raw:
Flagg's rookie season ends** as Mavericks win finale but drop to tied 7th/8th in draft lottery odds (6.7-6.8% for #1 pick), with Flagg suffering an ankle sprain; Mavs focus on draft lottery and future rebuild sans playoffs[2][3].  
No Raptors playoff confirmations or resolutions tie to Flagg; Raptors secured East 5th seed vs. Cavs, but unrelated to query[3].
